name: com.badranraza.ide.antigravity
description: Antigravity IDE integration for Unity. Adds Google Antigravity IDE (the VS Code-based code editor in the Antigravity product line) as an External Script Editor option, generates .csproj/.sln for IntelliSense, and offers single-instance window reuse. Detects Antigravity IDE specifically and ignores the standalone Antigravity 2.0 agent app.

_upm.changelog:
BREAKING CHANGE: package name renamed from com.unity.ide.antigravity to com.badranraza.ide.antigravity.

The com.unity.* namespace is reserved by Unity Technologies and OpenUPM rejects packages that use it. v2.0.0 moves to a third-party convention so the package can be listed on OpenUPM and to defend against any future Unity namespace enforcement.

Migrating from v1.x:

1. In Unity Package Manager, remove the old com.unity.ide.antigravity entry.
2. Re-add via the same git URL (https://github.com/BadranRaza/com.unity.ide.antigravity.git). Package Manager will install it under the new com.badranraza.ide.antigravity name.
3. Your External Tools selection survives the rename. No code changes are required in Unity projects.
